ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the optimization run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the optimization run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization run (e.g., started, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization run */,
  "run_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization run (e.g., supply chain, financial modeling) */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the run is executed (e.g., development, production) */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the run */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the run */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of stage (e.g., initial, refinement, final) */,
  "stage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the stage */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the stage */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "theta_tt" REAL /* Theta_tt parameter value */,
  "theta_c" REAL /* Theta_c parameter value */,
  "theta_s" REAL /* Theta_s parameter value */,
  "theta_k0" REAL /* Theta_k0 parameter value */,
  "theta_k1" REAL /* Theta_k1 parameter value */,
  "theta_k2" REAL /* Theta_k2 parameter value */,
  "theta_k3" REAL /* Theta_k3 parameter value */,
  "theta_k4" REAL /* Theta_k4 parameter value */,
  "theta_k5" REAL /* Theta_k5 parameter value */,
  "objective" REAL /* Objective function value */,
  "n_paths" INTEGER /* Number of paths */,
  "n_paths_added" INTEGER /* Number of paths added */,
  "n_paths_effectively_added" INTEGER /* Number of paths effectively added */,
  "vot" REAL /* Value of time (vot) */,
  "iteration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "iteration_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the iteration */,
  "iteration_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the iteration */,
  "iteration_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the iteration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the iteration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the iteration */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., theta, lambda) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., hours, dollars) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the parameter */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the parameter */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)
